title: The Man Company is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: The Man Company is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, The Man Company in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Man Company:
The Man Company is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Man Company!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
